signals.headline: Rakuten Payment Integration & Kyobo Partnership Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Rakuten Payment Integration & Kyobo Partnership Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
Rakuten Wallet launched XRP as a payment method for 44 million users in Japan on April 15, and Ripple announced a partnership with Kyobo Life Insurance for tokenized government bond settlement in Korea—both representing real institutional adoption catalysts[1].

signals.headline: ETF Inflows Surge | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
ETF Inflows Surge | YES | HIGH confidence**
XRP ETF inflows reached $17.6 million on April 16 (Wednesday), the highest single-day level since early February, signaling renewed institutional interest[1].

signals.headline: CLARITY Act Markup Timeline Uncertain | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
CLARITY Act Markup Timeline Uncertain | NO | MED confidence**
The CLARITY Act markup was scheduled for potential vote the week of April 27, but mounting pressure from banks and Senator Thom Tillis could push it to the second week of May, meaning no confirmation of April passage is yet resolved[3].
